title: rubus × scabrosiformis
intro: Rubus × scabrosiformis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or bramble, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help alleviate digestive issues and reduce the risk of certain diseases. The health benefits of Rubus × scabrosiformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Rubus × scabrosiformis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
